questions.question: Explain the role of MPI_Bcast and MPI_Reduce in the parallel trapezoidal rule implementation.
expectedPoints: MPI_Bcast distributes input parameters (a, b, n) from root process to all processes
MPI_Reduce combines partial integrals from all processes using summation
These collective operations ensure all processes have consistent data and can contribute to the final result

questions.question: Describe the complete parallel algorithm for the trapezoidal rule using MPI, including domain decomposition, local computation, and result aggregation steps.
expectedPoints: Domain decomposition: Divide [a,b] into p equal segments for p processes
Parameter distribution: Use MPI_Bcast to send a, b, n to all processes
Local computation: Each process calculates integral for its segment using trapezoidal rule
Result aggregation: Use MPI_Reduce with MPI_SUM to combine partial results
Output: Root process displays the final integral value
Consider load balancing and error analysis aspects
